text: An API bug gets assigned to a billing specialist.
A database error goes to the front-end end support.
Does that sound familiar? Welcome to the ticket shuffle.
Ron Robben Assignment assumes every agent is a generalist,
but when specialized tickets hit the wrong person,
you get unnecessary transfers, slower resolution times,
AI classifies every issue and automatically assigns it
to the team member with the right expertise.
Now an API bug goes straight to the integrations team.
That database error, it gets sent to a back-end support person,
You can add any filters and route by product areas,
issue severity, or other custom fields.
Set up the routing once, and Pylon.AI will automatically
